mapper.sql: BANK_ID, ORG, BANK_NAME, IS_AVAILABLE, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_BY, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, RESERVED_FIELD1, RESERVED_FIELD2, RESERVED_FIELD3, BANK_NAME_EN
mapper.select:
select
distinct
'true' as QUERYID,
from TBL_BANK_MANAGE
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
insert into TBL_BANK_MANAGE
BANK_ID,
ORG,
BANK_NAME,
IS_AVAILABLE,
CREATE_TIME,
CREATE_BY,
UPDATE_TIME,
UPDATE_BY,
RESERVED_FIELD1,
RESERVED_FIELD2,
RESERVED_FIELD3,
BANK_NAME_EN,
#{bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bankNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update TBL_BANK_MANAGE
BANK_ID = #{record.bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ORG = #{record.org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BANK_NAME = #{record.bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{record.isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BANK_NAME_EN = #{record.bankNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update TBL_BANK_MANAGE set BANK_ID = #{record.bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ORG = #{record.org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_NAME = #{record.bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{record.isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{record.reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{record.reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{record.reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_NAME_EN = #{record.bankNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TBL_BANK_MANAGE
ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BANK_NAME = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BANK_NAME_EN = #{bankNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where BANK_ID = #{bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update TBL_BANK_MANAGE set ORG = #{org,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_NAME = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IS_AVAILABLE = #{isAvailable,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CREATE_TIME = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, CREATE_BY = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, UPDATE_BY = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD1 = #{reservedField1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD2 = #{reservedField2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RESERVED_FIELD3 = #{reservedField3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_NAME_EN = #{bankNameEn,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where BANK_ID = #{bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
